Home / Services / Trenching and Utility Installation

Trenching and Utility Installation

Expert trenching services for installing water, sewer, and gas lines.

English Excavating & Plumbing Co. Inc provides professional trenching and utility installation services throughout the Indianapolis metro area. We have the experience and equipment to safely and efficiently install water, sewer, and gas lines for residential, commercial, and industrial properties. We understand the importance of proper trenching techniques to prevent damage to underground utilities and ensure the long-term reliability of your infrastructure. Our team is trained in safe excavation practices and adheres to all local regulations. We utilize trench boxes and shoring systems to protect workers and prevent cave-ins. We also provide backfilling and compaction services to ensure the trenches are properly closed and the surrounding area is restored. We work closely with utility companies to coordinate installations and ensure compliance with their standards. We handle everything from small residential repairs to large-scale commercial installations. We use laser levels and GPS technology to ensure accurate trench depths and slopes.

Our Process

  1. 01 Utility location and marking
  2. 02 Trench excavation to specified depth and width
  3. 03 Pipe installation and connection
  4. 04 Backfilling and compaction
  5. 05 Site restoration

Benefits

  • Safe and efficient utility installation
  • Prevention of damage to underground utilities
  • Compliance with local regulations
  • Long-term reliability of infrastructure

Frequently Asked Questions

How do you locate underground utilities?

We use a combination of utility maps, ground-penetrating radar, and potholing techniques to locate underground utilities before excavation.

What safety precautions do you take during trenching?

We use trench boxes and shoring systems to prevent cave-ins and protect workers. We also adhere to strict safety protocols and regulations.

Do you handle permits for utility installation?

Yes, we handle all necessary permits and inspections to ensure compliance with local regulations in Indianapolis and surrounding areas.

Get a Free Estimate

Ready to get started with trenching and utility installation? Contact us today.
